_**User (2026-03-15 09:07:02Z)**_

开始解决 home page 的一些问题：
Base UI: A component that acts as a button expected a non-<button> because the `nativeButton` prop is false. Rendering a <button> keeps native behavior while Base UI applies non-native attributes and handlers, which can add unintended extra attributes (such as `role` or `aria-disabled`). Use a non-<button> in the `render` prop, or set `nativeButton` to `true`.
    at DropdownMenuTrigger 
src/components/ui/dropdown-menu/index.tsx (33:5) @ DropdownMenuTrigger


  31 |
  32 |   return (
> 33 |     <MenuPrimitive.Trigger ref={ref} {...props}>
     |     ^
  34 |       {children}
Encountered two children with the same key, `5e0318319332d06503619337`. Keys should be unique so that components maintain their identity across updates. Non-unique keys may cause children to be duplicated and/or omitted — the behavior is unsupported and could change in a future version.

 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/dropdown-menu/index.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import './dropdown-menu.css'
     4→
     5→import { Menu as MenuPrimitive } from '@base-ui/react/menu'
     6→import * as React from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { clsxm as cn } from '~/lib/helper'
     9→
    10→const DropdownMenu = MenuPrimitive.Root
    11→
    12→const DropdownMenuTrigger = ({
    13→  ref,
    14→  asChild,
    15→  children,
    16→  ...props
    17→}: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Trigger> & {
    18→  asChild?: boolean
    19→} & {
    20→  ref?: React.RefObject<HTMLButtonElement | null>
    21→}) => {
    22→  if (asChild && React.isValidElement(children)) {
    23→    return (
    24→      <MenuPrimitive.Trigger
    25→        ref={ref}
    26→        {...props}
    27→        render={children as React.ReactElement}
    28→      />
    29→    )
    30→  }
    31→
    32→  return (
    33→    <MenuPrimitive.Trigger ref={ref} {...props}>
    34→      {children}
    35→    </MenuPrimitive.Trigger>
    36→  )
    37→}
    38→DropdownMenuTrigger.displayName = 'DropdownMenuTrigger'
    39→
    40→const DropdownMenuGroup = MenuPrimitive.Group
    41→
    42→const DropdownMenuPortal = MenuPrimitive.Portal
    43→
    44→const DropdownMenuSub = MenuPrimitive.SubmenuRoot
    45→
    46→const DropdownMenuRadioGroup = MenuPrimitive.RadioGroup
    47→
    48→const DropdownMenuSubTrigger = ({
    49→  ref,
    50→  className,
    51→  inset,
    52→  children,
    53→  ...props
    54→}: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.SubmenuTrigger> & {
    55→  inset?: boolean
    56→} & {
    57→  ref?: React.RefObject<React.ElementRef<
    58→    typeof MenuPrimitive.SubmenuTrigger
    59→  > | null>
    60→}) => (
    61→  <MenuPrimitive.SubmenuTrigger
    62→    ref={ref}
    63→    className={cn(
    64→      'flex cursor-default select-none items-center rounded-xs px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-hidden',
    65→      'data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-100/80 data-[open]:bg-neutral-100 dark:data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-800 dark:data-[open]:bg-neutral-800',
    66→      inset && 'pl-8',
    67→      className,
    68→    )}
    69→    {...props}
    70→  >
    71→    {children}
    72→    <i className="i-mingcute-down-line ml-auto size-4" />
    73→  </MenuPrimitive.SubmenuTrigger>
    74→)
    75→DropdownMenuSubTrigger.displayName = 'DropdownMenuSubTrigger'
    76→
    77→const DropdownMenuContent = ({
    78→  ref,
    79→  className,
    80→  keepMounted = false,
    81→  sideOffset = 4,
    82→  side,
    83→  align,
    84→  alignOffset,
    85→
    86→  positionMethod,
    87→  ...props
    88→}: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Popup> & {
    89→  sideOffset?: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<
    90→    typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner
    91→  >['sideOffset']
    92→  side?: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['side']
    93→  align?: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<
    94→    typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner
    95→  >['align']
    96→  alignOffset?: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<
    97→    typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner
    98→  >['alignOffset']
    99→  keepMounted?: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<
   100→    typeof MenuPrimitive.Portal
   101→  >['keepMounted']
   102→  positionMethod?: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<
   103→    typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner
   104→  >['positionMethod']
   105→} & {
   106→  ref?: React.RefObject<React.ElementRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Popup> | null>
   107→}) => (
   108→  <MenuPrimitive.Portal keepMounted={keepMounted}>
   109→    <MenuPrimitive.Positioner
   110→      align={align}
   111→      alignOffset={alignOffset}
   112→      className="z-50"
   113→      positionMethod={positionMethod}
   114→      side={side}
   115→      sideOffset={sideOffset}
   116→    >
   117→      <MenuPrimitive.Popup
   118→        ref={ref}
   119→        className={cn(
   120→          'dropdown-menu-popup min-w-32 overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-neutral-4/50 bg-neutral-1 p-1 text-neutral-9 drop-shadow',
   121→          className,
   122→        )}
   123→        {...props}
   124→      />
   125→    </MenuPrimitive.Positioner>
   126→  </MenuPrimitive.Portal>
   127→)
   128→DropdownMenuContent.displayName = 'DropdownMenuContent'
   129→
   130→const DropdownMenuItem = ({
   131→  ref,
   132→  className,
   133→  inset,
   134→  ...props
   135→}: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Item> & {
   136→  inset?: boolean
   137→  icon?: React.ReactNode
   138→} & {
   139→  ref?: React.RefObject<React.ElementRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Item> | null>
   140→}) => (
   141→  <MenuPrimitive.Item
   142→    ref={ref}
   143→    className={cn(
   144→      'relative flex cursor-default select-none items-center rounded-md px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-hidden transition-colors data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none data-[disabled]:opacity-50',
   145→      'data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-100 dark:data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-800',
   146→      inset && 'pl-8',
   147→      'focus-within:!outline-transparent',
   148→      className,
   149→    )}
   150→    {...props}
   151→  >
   152→    {props.icon && (
   153→      <span className="mr-1.5 inline-flex size-4 items-center justify-center">
   154→        {props.icon}
   155→      </span>
   156→    )}
   157→    {props.children}
   158→    {/* Justify Fill */}
   159→    {props.icon && <span className="ml-1.5 size-4" />}
   160→  </MenuPrimitive.Item>
   161→)
   162→DropdownMenuItem.displayName = 'DropdownMenuItem'
   163→
   164→const DropdownMenuLabel = ({
   165→  ref,
   166→  className,
   167→  inset,
   168→  ...props
   169→}: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.GroupLabel> & {
   170→  inset?: boolean
   171→} & {
   172→  ref?: React.RefObject<React.ElementRef<
   173→    typeof MenuPrimitive.GroupLabel
   174→  > | null>
   175→}) => (
   176→  <MenuPrimitive.GroupLabel
   177→    ref={ref}
   178→    className={cn(
   179→      'px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold',
   180→      inset && 'pl-8',
   181→      className,
   182→    )}
   183→    {...props}
   184→  />
   185→)
   186→DropdownMenuLabel.displayName = 'DropdownMenuLabel'
   187→
   188→const DropdownMenuSeparator = ({
   189→  ref,
   190→  className,
   191→  ...props
   192→}: React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Separator> & {
   193→  ref?: React.RefObject<React.ElementRef<typeof MenuPrimitive.Separator> | null>
   194→}) => (
   195→  <MenuPrimitive.Separator
   196→    className={cn('-mx-1 my-1 h-px bg-neutral-4/20', className)}
   197→    ref={ref}
   198→    {...props}
   199→  />
   200→)
   201→DropdownMenuSeparator.displayName = 'DropdownMenuSeparator'
   202→
   203→const DropdownMenuShortcut = ({
   204→  className,
   205→  ...props
   206→}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>) => (
   207→  <span
   208→    className={cn('ml-auto text-xs tracking-widest opacity-60', className)}
   209→    {...props}
   210→  />
   211→)
   212→DropdownMenuShortcut.displayName = 'DropdownMenuShortcut'
   213→
   214→export {
   215→  DropdownMenu,
   216→  DropdownMenuContent,
   217→  DropdownMenuGroup,
   218→  DropdownMenuItem,
   219→  DropdownMenuLabel,
   220→  DropdownMenuPortal,
   221→  DropdownMenuRadioGroup,
   222→  DropdownMenuSeparator,
   223→  DropdownMenuShortcut,
   224→  DropdownMenuSub,
   225→  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
   226→  DropdownMenuTrigger,
   227→}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(home)/components/BottomSection.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type {
     4→  BookMetadata,
     5→  MediaMetadata,
     6→  MusicMetadata,
     7→  RecentlyModel,
     8→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     9→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
    10→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
    11→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
    12→import { useMemo } from 'react'
    13→
    14→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    15→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    16→import { getNoteRouteParams } from '~/lib/note-route'
    17→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    18→import { routeBuilder, Routes } from '~/lib/route-builder'
    19→
    20→const useRecentlyData = () =>
    21→  useQuery({
    22→    queryKey: ['recently', 'home'],
    23→    queryFn: async () =>
    24→      (await apiClient.recently.getList({ size: 20 })).$serialized,
    25→    staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,
    26→  })
    27→
    28→const useRecentComments = () => {
    29→  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
    30→    queryKey: ['home-activity-recent'],
    31→    queryFn: async () =>
    32→      (await apiClient.activity.getRecentActivities()).$serialized,
    33→    refetchOnMount: true,
    34→    meta: { persist: true },
    35→  })
    36→  return { comments: data?.comment?.slice(0, 3) ?? [], isLoading }
    37→}
    38→
    39→const SectionHeading = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) => (
    40→  <div className="mb-4 text-xs uppercase tracking-[4px] text-neutral-400 dark:text-neutral-500 lg:mb-5">
    41→    {children}
    42→  </div>
    43→)
    44→
    45→const NowStatus = ({
    46→  data,
    47→  isLoading,
    48→}: {
    49→  data: ReturnType<typeof useRecentlyData>['data']
    50→  isLoading: boolean
    51→}) => {
    52→  const t = useTranslations('home')
    53→
    54→  const nowItems = useMemo(() => {
    55→    if (!data?.data) return null
    56→    const items = data.data as RecentlyModel[]
    57→    const book = items.find((i) => i.type === 'book')
    58→    const music = items.find((i) => i.type === 'music')
    59→    const media = items.find((i) => i.type === 'media')
    60→    if (!book && !music && !media) return null
    61→    return { book, music, media }
    62→  }, [data])
    63→
    64→  if (isLoading) {
    65→    return (
    66→      <div>
    67→        {Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, i) => (
    68→          <div
    69→            className="mb-3 h-4 w-[70%] animate-pulse rounded bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700"
    70→            key={i}
    71→          />
    72→        ))}
    73→      </div>
    74→    )
    75→  }
    76→
    77→  if (!nowItems) return null
    78→
    79→  return (
    80→    <div>
    81→      {nowItems.book?.metadata && (
    82→        <div className="mb-3.5 last:mb-0">
    83→          <div className="mb-1 text-xs text-neutral-400">
    84→            {t('second_reading')}
    85→          </div>
    86→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    87→            <span className="text-sm">📖</span>
    88→            <span className="text-base text-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-200">
    89→              {(nowItems.book.metadata as BookMetadata).title}
    90→            </span>
    91→            <span className="text-xs text-neutral-400">
    92→              {(nowItems.book.metadata as BookMetadata).author}
    93→            </span>
    94→          </div>
    95→        </div>
    96→      )}
    97→      {nowItems.music?.metadata && (
    98→        <div className="mb-3.5 last:mb-0">
    99→          <div className="mb-1 text-xs text-neutral-400">
   100→            {t('second_listening')}
   101→          </div>
   102→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   103→            <span className="text-sm">♪</span>
   104→            <span className="text-base text-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-200">
   105→              {(nowItems.music.metadata as MusicMetadata).title}
   106→            </span>
   107→            <span className="text-xs text-neutral-400">
   108→              {(nowItems.music.metadata as MusicMetadata).artist}
   109→            </span>
   110→          </div>
   111→        </div>
   112→      )}
   113→      {nowItems.media?.metadata && (
   114→        <div className="mb-3.5 last:mb-0">
   115→          <div className="mb-1 text-xs text-neutral-400">
   116→            {t('second_watching')}
   117→          </div>
   118→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   119→            <span className="text-base text-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-200">
   120→              {(nowItems.media.metadata as MediaMetadata).title}
   121→            </span>
   122→            {/* eslint-disable-next-line eqeqeq */}
   123→            {(nowItems.media.metadata as MediaMetadata).rating != null && (
   124→              <span className="text-xs text-amber-500">
   125→                {'★'.repeat(
   126→                  Math.round(
   127→                    ((nowItems.media.metadata as MediaMetadata).rating ?? 0) /
   128→                      2,
   129→                  ),
   130→                )}
   131→              </span>
   132→            )}
   133→          </div>
   134→        </div>
   135→      )}
   136→    </div>
   137→  )
   138→}
   139→
   140→const RecentLetters = ({
   141→  comments,
   142→  isLoading,
   143→}: {
   144→  comments: {
   145→    created: string
   146→    author: string
   147→    text: string
   148→    id: string
   149→    title: string
   150→    slug?: string
   151→    nid?: string
   152→    type: string
   153→  }[]
   154→  isLoading: boolean
   155→}) => {
   156→  if (isLoading) {
   157→    return (
   158→      <div>
   159→        {Array.from({ length: 2 }).map((_, i) => (
   160→          <div
   161→            className="mb-2.5 h-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700"
   162→            key={i}
   163→          />
   164→        ))}
   165→      </div>
   166→    )
   167→  }
   168→
   169→  if (!comments.length) return null
   170→
   171→  return (
   172→    <div>
   173→      {comments.map((comment) => {
   174→        const commentUrl =
   175→          comment.type === 'Note' && comment.nid
   176→            ? routeBuilder(
   177→                Routes.Note,
   178→                getNoteRouteParams({ nid: Number(comment.nid) }),
   179→              )
   180→            : comment.slug
   181→              ? routeBuilder(Routes.Post, { category: '-', slug: comment.slug })
   182→              : undefined
   183→
   184→        return (
   185→          <div
   186→            className="mb-2.5 rounded-[3px] bg-[rgba(200,180,160,0.05)] p-3.5 last:mb-0 dark:bg-neutral-800/30"
   187→            key={comment.id}
   188→          >
   189→            <div className="line-clamp-2 text-base italic leading-[1.7] text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
   190→              &ldquo;{comment.text}&rdquo;
   191→            </div>
   192→            <div className="mt-1.5 flex items-baseline justify-between text-xs text-neutral-400">
   193→              {commentUrl && comment.title ? (
   194→                <Link
   195→                  className="truncate text-neutral-400 transition-colors hover:text-accent"
   196→                  href={commentUrl}
   197→                >
   198→                  {comment.title}
   199→                </Link>
   200→              ) : (
   201→                <span />
   202→              )}
   203→              <span className="ml-2 shrink-0 whitespace-nowrap">
   204→                &mdash; {comment.author} &middot;{' '}
   205→                <RelativeTime date={comment.created} />
   206→              </span>
   207→            </div>
   208→          </div>
   209→        )
   210→      })}
   211→    </div>
   212→  )
   213→}
   214→
   215→const Musings = ({
   216→  data,
   217→  isLoading,
   218→}: {
   219→  data: ReturnType<typeof useRecentlyData>['data']
   220→  isLoading: boolean
   221→}) => {
   222→  const musings = useMemo(() => {
   223→    if (!data?.data) return []
   224→    const items = data.data as RecentlyModel[]
   225→    return items.filter((i) => i.type === 'text').slice(0, 2)
   226→  }, [data])
   227→
   228→  if (isLoading) {
   229→    return (
   230→      <div>
   231→        {Array.from({ length: 2 }).map((_, i) => (
   232→          <div
   233→            className="mb-3 h-12 animate-pulse rounded bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700"
   234→            key={i}
   235→          />
   236→        ))}
   237→      </div>
   238→    )
   239→  }
   240→
   241→  if (!musings.length) return null
   242→
   243→  return (
   244→    <div>
   245→      {musings.map((musing) => (
   246→        <div
   247→          className="mb-3.5 border-l-2 border-[rgba(200,180,160,0.15)] pl-3 last:mb-0 dark:border-neutral-700"
   248→          key={musing.id}
   249→        >
   250→          <div className="text-base italic leading-[1.8] text-neutral-500/80 dark:text-neutral-400">
   251→            &ldquo;{musing.content}&rdquo;
   252→          </div>
   253→        </div>
   254→      ))}
   255→      {musings[0] && (
   256→        <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-neutral-400">
   257→          <RelativeTime date={musings[0].created} />
   258→        </div>
   259→      )}
   260→    </div>
   261→  )
   262→}
   263→
   264→export const BottomSection = () => {
   265→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   266→  const recentlyQuery = useRecentlyData()
   267→  const commentsQuery = useRecentComments()
   268→
   269→  const nowItems = useMemo(() => {
   270→    if (!recentlyQuery.data?.data) return null
   271→    const items = recentlyQuery.data.data as RecentlyModel[]
   272→    const book = items.find((i) => i.type === 'book')
   273→    const music = items.find((i) => i.type === 'music')
   274→    const media = items.find((i) => i.type === 'media')
   275→    if (!book && !music && !media) return null
   276→    return { book, music, media }
   277→  }, [recentlyQuery.data])
   278→
   279→  const musings = useMemo(() => {
   280→    if (!recentlyQuery.data?.data) return []
   281→    const items = recentlyQuery.data.data as RecentlyModel[]
   282→    return items.filter((i) => i.type === 'text').slice(0, 2)
   283→  }, [recentlyQuery.data])
   284→
   285→  const isLoading = recentlyQuery.isLoading || commentsQuery.isLoading
   286→  const hasNow = !!nowItems
   287→  const hasLetters = commentsQuery.comments.length > 0
   288→  const hasMusings = musings.length > 0
   289→  const hasAny = hasNow || hasLetters || hasMusings
   290→
   291→  if (!hasAny && !isLoading) return null
   292→
   293→  const columns: ReactNode[] = []
   294→  const addColumn = (key: string, show: boolean, content: ReactNode) => {
   295→    if (!show && !isLoading) return
   296→    if (columns.length > 0) {
   297→      columns.push(
   298→        <div
   299→          className="hidden w-px shrink-0 bg-[rgba(200,180,160,0.12)] dark:bg-neutral-800 lg:block"
   300→          key={`div-${key}`}
   301→        />,
   302→      )
   303→    }
   304→    columns.push(
   305→      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1" key={key}>
   306→        {content}
   307→      </div>,
   308→    )
   309→  }
   310→
   311→  addColumn(
   312→    'now',
   313→    hasNow,
   314→    <>
   315→      <SectionHeading>{t('second_now')}</SectionHeading>
   316→      <NowStatus
   317→        data={recentlyQuery.data}
   318→        isLoading={recentlyQuery.isLoading}
   319→      />
   320→    </>,
   321→  )
   322→
   323→  addColumn(
   324→    'letters',
   325→    hasLetters,
   326→    <>
   327→      <SectionHeading>{t('second_letters')}</SectionHeading>
   328→      <RecentLetters
   329→        comments={commentsQuery.comments}
   330→        isLoading={commentsQuery.isLoading}
   331→      />
   332→    </>,
   333→  )
   334→
   335→  addColumn(
   336→    'musings',
   337→    hasMusings,
   338→    <>
   339→      <SectionHeading>{t('second_musings')}</SectionHeading>
   340→      <Musings data={recentlyQuery.data} isLoading={recentlyQuery.isLoading} />
   341→    </>,
   342→  )
   343→
   344→  return (
   345→    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 lg:flex-row lg:gap-8">{columns}</div>
   346→  )
   347→}
   348→
```
</details></tool-use>

二问题皆明，即修之。

**问题一**：Base UI `MenuPrimitive.Trigger` 默认渲染 `<button>`，然 `nativeButton` 未显式设 `true`，故警告。非 `asChild` 分支加 `nativeButton` 即可。

**问题二**：API 返回 comments 中有重复 `id`，须去重。
